name: corn oil
description: Corn oil is used as a cooking oil and fat source in food products, contributing to texture, flavor, and heat transfer.

Also-called-like-this: Corn Oil What-it-does: emulsifying , perfuming Irritancy: 0 Comedogenicity: 0-3 Official CosIng Information All Functions: emulsifying, hair conditioning, masking, perfuming, skin conditioning Description: zea mays oil is the refined fixed oil obtained from wet milling of the corn, zea mays l., gramineae. it consists primarily of the glycerides of the fatty acids linoleic,
